blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,174 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
